titleStmt.title: SII 7.330: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 330. (A.R. No. 139 of 1901). ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF PADMANABHABHATTA'S HOUSE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīsōmanātha śaraṇu . namastuṁgaśiraścu
ṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa
1281 neya va¨rttamāna vikāri saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 30 Ādivā
rada Addhōdayadaṁdu svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirā
yavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṁ
ṇnavoḍeyara rājyābhyudayadalu Ā bukkaṁṇnavoḍeyara ni
rūpadalu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ malleya daṁṇnāyakaru bārakū
rarājyava nāḷuva kāladalu taṁbulageṟeya śrīsōmanāthadēvara saṁ
nidhyadalu hubbaḷḷiya baṁkarasara makkaḷu kāḷimarasaru haṁneraḍu praje
brāhmaṇarige tsatrakke māḍidaṁthā dha¨rmapritiṣṭhege Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi na
ḍavudakke māḍidaṁthā maṭhada catussīme mūḍalu kiṟiyabeṭṭamūḍiṁdaṁ
paḍuvalu teṁkalu heddāriyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu mū¨rttidēvara
maṭhada sīmeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu śrīsōmanāthadēvara tōṭada ga
diṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷḷaṁthā nidhi nikṣēpa jala pā
ṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhya muṁtāgi Ēnuḷḷadanū mūṟukēriya mū
varu seṭṭikāṟaru nūrayvatteḷame muṁtāgi śrīsōmanāthadēvarige A¨rththapari
tsēdavāgi koṭṭu mūlaparitsēdavāgi dhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi Eṟasikoṁḍu ka
ṭṭisida Ā maṭhadalli naḍava dha¨rmma pratidina 1 kke Ā tsatradalli vuṁba brāhma
ṇaru 12 Aḍigeya māḍuva brāhmaṇa 1 Antu brāhmaṇaru 13 kke pratidina
kke nāḍa hāne 13 ṟa lekkadallu varuṣa 1 kkaṁ dina 366 kke Akki nāḍahāneyi
llu 4760 kke hāne 40 ṟa lekkada Akki mūḍe 119 kke bhatta mūḍe 59 hā
ne 20 dēvara Amrutapaḍige pratidina 1 kke Akki nāḍahāne 1 ṟa lekka vi va
ruṣa 1 kke bhatta mūḍe 23 Ā maṭhada biḍila soratiyakelasava māḍu
va kuṁbāṟikege varuṣa 1 kke bhatta mūḍe 5 Ā maṭhada baḍige gelasada besa
vittige varuṣa 1 kke bhatta mūḍe 9 Antu bhatta mūḍe 334 hāne 20 Ā tsa
trada mēluveccakke pratidina 1 kke bārakūra r 1 . lekkadalu varuṣa 1 ke
bārakūra ga 68 r 5 maṭhakke migesu ga 6 r 4 Antu ga 74 Aṁntu va¨rṣa 1 ke
bhatta mūḍe 334 roka ga 74 ke naḍava bāḷina vivara Arasana bacca
la bāḷinalu nāgaṁḍuga mūḍe 150 boppeyabēhāriya kaiyyalu mū
lava koṁḍa bāḷu kaṁca yiccuvana kayyalu koṁḍa mūḍeya mūḍi
saha Ā bāḷuyoḷagāgi A bāḷina dēva naḍava bhatta mūḍe 185
A(ṁ)ntū dha¨rmmakke naḍava bhatta nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 335 mēluveccake na
ḍavadu tōṭagēṇi Arsana baccala tōṭadiṁda ga 44 bopeya bēhāriya
kayyalu koṁḍa bāḷu keṁca yiccuvana kayya koṁḍa bāḷina tō
ṭadiṁda kā ga 30 A(ṁ)ntū ga 74 hoṁnū naḍavadu yi dha¨rmmake na
ḍavaṁthā bāḷanū mūligaḷa kayyalu A¨rththaparitsēdhavāgi koṭṭu
mūlaparitsēdhavāgi dāreyanū Eṟasikoṁḍu A bāḷinamēle baṁ
daṁthā samudāya Anāya Ēnuḷadanū Arsina kayyalu sa¨rvamānyavā
gi koḍisi koṁḍu kāḷimarsaru dha¨rmavanū naḍasi baharu yi dha¨rmmavanū
śrīsōmanāthadēvarū mūṟukēriya halarū pratipālisuvaru
yi dha¨rmakeŪ A dha¨rmmadācariṁgeŪ sa¨rvvamāṁnyavāgi Arsugaḷu kaṁ
ḍu barasikoṭṭa śilāśāśana [.] daṁṇāyakara suhastayoppa mattu
4 svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapālanayō[¨rmadhyē]
dānātrsēyōnru pālanaṁ . dānāt sva¨rggamavāpnōti
pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . maṁggaḷa mahāśrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.330 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
